name: radio
description: Radio button with animated dot, label, description, and RadioGroup context for exclusive selection.

props.name: value
props.description: The value this Radio option represents; compared against RadioGroup value to determine selection

props.name: label
props.description: Primary text label rendered beside the radio button

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary descriptive text rendered below the label

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables this radio option independently of the group

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the radio item container
